TRAINING.doctrine: Focus on safe maneuvers. Keep drones separated by at least 20m. Test altitude variations between 5m and 120m.
TRAINING.altitude_rules: Standard flight at 20m AGL, maximum height 120m

SAR.doctrine: MAXIMUM URGENCY. Deploy all available assets immediately. Prioritize area coverage over battery life. If battery < 20%, continue search until bingo fuel (10%). Follow a grid pattern starting from the Last Known Position (LKP).
SAR.altitude_rules: Search altitude: 10m for inspection, 200m for reconnaissance.

MILITARY.doctrine: Maintain persistent overwatch. Strategic drones (Reaper/Triton) must stay at high altitude (>500m) to avoid detection. Tactical assets should use terrain masking if possible (stay low until needed). Kamikaze assets (eg. Shahed) must wait for explicit STRIKE confirmation.
MILITARY.altitude_rules: Combat altitude: 500m+ for overwatch, <30m for tactical approach.

LOGISTICS.doctrine: Efficiency and direct routing. Maintain steady cruise speed. Avoid flight below 20m in urban areas. Ensure clear landing zone before final descent.

DEFENSE.doctrine: PERSISTENT OVERWATCH. High-Value Asset Protection. Implement asset rotation: keep 50% of the swarm on patrol while 50% stays at home base for battery conservation. In case of 'PERSON' detection, dispatch nearest asset for Silent Interception (Altitude 5m-10m). Avoid direct engagement.
DEFENSE.altitude_rules: Patrol at 15m. Inspection at 5m. Strategic overwatch at 100m.
